subcodes.first_line: Verily We send down the verses from Our preserved Tablet unto those who have found the fragrance of God and have turned unto Him with hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نلقی الایات من لوحنا المحفوظ الی الذین وجدوا عرف الله و توجهوا الیه بقلوب
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @knowledge; recognition of God, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
